name: amazon-seller-pp-mcp
description: Operate an Amazon seller account from the terminal: inventory, orders, reports, listings, and catalog.

sp_api_lwa_client_id.title: SP_API_LWA_CLIENT_ID
sp_api_lwa_client_id.description: Sets SP_API_LWA_CLIENT_ID for the Amazon Seller MCP server. Use the LWA client ID from your private SP-API application.

sp_api_lwa_client_secret.title: SP_API_LWA_CLIENT_SECRET
sp_api_lwa_client_secret.description: Sets SP_API_LWA_CLIENT_SECRET for the Amazon Seller MCP server. Use the LWA client secret from your private SP-API application.

sp_api_refresh_token.title: SP_API_REFRESH_TOKEN
sp_api_refresh_token.description: Sets SP_API_REFRESH_TOKEN for the Amazon Seller MCP server. Use the refresh token from self-authorizing your private SP-API application.
